history.content:
<thought>
The cell directly in front (north) is safe floor at (6, D). Moving forward there will bring me closer to the goal. From there, I can proceed north again to (5, D), then turn east to reach the goal at (5, F).
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at row 7, column D, facing north. The cell directly ahead (row 6, column D) is floor, safe to move. The goal is at row 6, column E, one step ahead and one step to the right. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal and avoid the lava at row 7, columns E and F.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at row 7, column D, facing north. The goal 'G' is at row 7, column F, two cells to the east. The cell directly east (row 7, column E) is a floor cell, and the cell beyond that is the goal. To move east, I need to turn right (clockwise) from north to face east. The forward cell is a wall, so I cannot go straight.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at row 07 column D, facing north. The goal is directly north at row 05 column D, two cells away. The cell immediately in front (row 06 column D) is a floor cell (.), so it is safe to move forward. There are no obstacles in the direct path. I will move forward to approach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at row 7, column D, facing north. The cell directly north (row 6, column D) contains the goal G. There is no obstacle or lava in that cell. I can move forward to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
